sales.source_notes: Prime location situated on a 40 x 75 corner lot. ONE block to the beautiful Belmar beach and Boardwalk.Enjoy the best of coastal living and WALK to the beach. Whether you decide to fully renovate the existing home or start new, this will be your ultimate shore retreat. Home has a detached garage for ample parking and storage. Don't miss out on this incredibly rare opportunity to make amazing summer memories and live a stones throw to the beach

Location, Style and Value... You'll love this charming cottage with REAL hardwood floors, original clapboard siding, and inviting front porch. The full basement is perfect for a hobbie room, offering lots of storage, along with a 1/2 bath - - a must have for visiting guests. The western end of Belmar has quiet, tree-lined strees and sidewalks, is closest to the Shark River beach and waterfront restaurants, and is the best kept secret at the Jersey Shore.

NEW CONSTRUCTION in the sought after north end of Belmar! There is nothing better than a new house to immediately enjoy and start creating memories at the Jersey shore w/ friends and family. This low maintenance 4 Bed 3 Bath home + BONUS 3rd floor w/ balcony features an amazing inground pool, pavers/deck for entertaining and convenient location midway to downtown and the beach/boardwalk. The home features a chef's kitchen w/ 6 burner Thermador, large center island w/ beautiful countertops/cabinets, crown molding, a sought after FIRST LEVEL BEDROOM + full bath, 2nd level laundry room and more. The spacious primary suite has its own private balcony, bathroom w/ double sinks and luxurious shower, and a large walk-in closet. Other features include Anderson windows/sliders, flexible option for cabana or shed for storage for bikes, beach chairs, & surfboards. The property also features plenty of off-street parking w/ private paver driveway & upgraded landscaping package.  You will love this location in town and all that Belmar has to offer. With recent new construction townhome sales nearby at this price point and above securing this turn-key single-family is a homerun. Take action today and start living your best life at the shore! New construction opportunities are rare to come by and nothing needed other than to unpack. (10-year new home warranty*) Great neighborhood for primary residence beach house or part time. Close to downtown, train to NYC, excellent restaurants and marina for boating/dining by the sunset.
Multi Family property. Front house and back house. Back house currently listed for rent for 3500

Charming shore colonial  located in one of Belmar's most desirable sections—just 3 blocks from the beach & close to downtown, dining, and NYC train. The main house offers an enclosed front porch, sunroom, & spacious living room with hardwood floors and a wood-burning FP. A formal dining room, & spacious kitchen, updated with newer stainless steel appliances and a commercial-grade stove. The first floor includes 2 bedrooms, including a master suite, while the second floor features another master plus 2 additional BRs w/ hardwood floors, cedar closets, and ample storage. Updated bathrooms throughout add to the appeal. Above the two-car garage is a private one-bedroom apartment with separate entrance and balcony—perfect for rent.

Welcome to this charming Belmar home, perfectly situated in one of the Jersey Shore's most beloved beach towns. Just steps to the picturesque marina, and blocks to the ocean, this home offers the ideal blend of coastal living and everyday convenience. Step inside and feel the warmth immediately. Freshly painted with gleaming wood floors throughout, the home radiates comfort and character. A welcoming covered front porch, sets the tone and is ideal for morning coffee, evening breezes or just watching the world go by. Each room feels inviting and thoughtfully cared for. Out back, enjoy the perfect sized yard. Whether you're seeking a year round home or a beach getaway don't miss the chance to make this yours.

DON'T MISS THIS INCREDIBLE MULTI FAMILY INVESTMENT OPPORTUNITY IN BELMAR!  All 5 residences are occupied with annual leases expiring in 2026 and all have separate utilities! The main house is a 3 family and there are 2 cottages with 2 bedrooms each in the rear of the property. A large parking lot on the property provides assigned parking spaces for all of the residences. This property generates over $102,000 in gross annual income.   Conveniently located near beaches, restaurants, and major transportation. This is an Estate Sale being sold strictly 'As-Is' due diligence is recommended.  With some TLC this could be a turnkey income producing asset making it an ideal addition to any investor' s portfolio!

Construction is complete on this stunning custom colonial! Located just blocks from the ocean. Sensational gourmet kitchen w/custom cabinetry, 11' island, dining area and professional appliances open to the living room that features a gas fireplace. A first floor ensuite bedroom plus a den/office. 6 generous sized bedrooms in total w/ 5 full bathrooms. Imported Italian marble and tile in all of the bathrooms, one more fabulous than the next! On the third floor you will find a spacious loft, perfect for a play area, or media area. Top quality throughout! A Trex deck off the back of the home with large enclosed private yard (50x166') with sprinkler system leaves plenty of room for a pool and entertaining guests. Welcome to your home at the Jersey Shore!
